metadata.description: Multi-host paid advertising audit, optimization, and AI creative generation conforming to the Agent Skills open standard.

plugins.name: claude-ads
plugins.description: Multi-host paid advertising audit & optimization skill conforming to the Agent Skills open standard. Verified on Claude Code; experimental on Codex CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Goose. 250+ checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple & Amazon Ads. 22 sub-skills, 10 parallel agents, 12 industry templates, attribution and server-side tracking deep dives, AI creative generation, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, 41-test pytest eval harness.
